_NOTICE: NO-OP TEMPLATE — NOT SUBMITTABLE. This template uses synthetic placeholders throughout. It does not contain real bucket names, real credentials, real Miami LAZ URIs, real image digests, or any executable authorization. The no-op command cannot reach Cloud Storage or /mnt/t7. Do not run 'gcloud batch jobs submit' with this template without replacing ALL placeholders and completing independent review.
_CLOUD_EXECUTION_STATUS: NO-GO. Cloud execution is not authorized. See docs/diagnostics/GCP_PARALLEL_TILE_COMPUTE_STRATEGY.md.

_design_notes.taskCount: Capped at 2 for the initial benchmark. Do not increase without scaling-progression approval (see strategy doc).
_design_notes.parallelism: Capped at 2 to match taskCount for the initial benchmark.
_design_notes.machineType: n2-standard-4 provides 4 vCPU / 16 GB RAM. n2-standard-8 (8 vCPU / 32 GB RAM) is the benchmark ceiling. No GPU.
_design_notes.provisioningModel: STANDARD VMs only for the initial benchmark. Spot VMs require proven idempotency and partial-write detection first.
_design_notes.maxRetryCount: 1 on the task spec (plus the initial attempt = 2 total). See strategy doc for retry boundary rationale.
_design_notes.maxRunDuration: 3600s (1 hour) per task. Adjust after benchmark timing data is collected.
_design_notes.bootDiskMib: 51200 MiB (50 GB). Size must accommodate container image, single LAZ file, and intermediate outputs. Review after benchmark.
_design_notes.allowedLocations: Single explicit region. Cross-region data transfer is not authorized.
_design_notes.serviceAccount: Dedicated Batch service account. Least-privilege. See GCP_BATCH_IAM_DATA_BOUNDARY.md.
_design_notes.volumes: Task manifests staged to an isolated GCS prefix. No persistent shared volume. No /mnt/t7 access.
_design_notes.REAL_DATA_EXECUTION_ENABLED: Set to the string 'false'. The entrypoint must reject any value other than the authorized sentinel. The template must not contain execution credentials or authorization tokens.
_design_notes.image_identity: The imageUri must include @sha256:<digest> — mutable tags alone are not permitted as execution identity.
_design_notes.no_real_miami_uris: This template does not contain any canonical Miami LAZ paths, canonical tile SHA-256 hashes, or real Cloud Storage bucket names.
